hub_subtitle: Conversação para Feiras Internacionais de Turismo & Hotelaria

lesson.menu_desc: Talking about plans, goals and future commitments -- 32 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 5 -- What's Next
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Andrea Aggio | Aula 5 -- What's Next

listenings.text: Hi Andrea, it is Henrik from Frankfurt. I am calling about our plans for next season. As we discussed, we are going to expand our corporate travel program, and I think Escape Turismo is the perfect partner for the MICE segment. Here is what I am thinking. We are attending ITB in March, so let us schedule a proper meeting there. Before that, I will send you our upcoming rates and a draft agreement by the end of the month. If everything looks good, we can confirm the partnership and arrange a fam trip for your team in April. I am really looking forward to working with you. Give me a call this week, and we will finalize the first steps. Talk soon.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the closing session of the fair. Before you leave, here is a quick look at what is coming next. Our upcoming calendar is full of opportunities. In March, the next edition of ITB will open in Berlin, and registration is already available at the main desk. In May, we are launching a special program for the luxury travel and MICE segments, with new charter flight options and all-inclusive packages. We are also going to host a series of online meetings for ground operators who could not join us this week. Please confirm your interest by the end of the month, and we look forward to seeing you again very soon.
